title: Scotland hopes on the brink following defeat against Brazil
summary: Scotland's World Cup knockout ambitions are in serious jeopardy after losing 3-0 to Brazil in Group C, with defensive lapses proving costly. The defeat leaves Scotland's path to the last 32 uncertain heading into final group matches. Brazil finishes atop Group C as group winners.
content: Scotland's hopes of reaching the knockout stages of the World Cup for the first time are in significant peril with calamitous defending allowed Brazil to win 3-0 in Miami and finish top of Group C.

zh.title: 苏格兰在对巴西失利后希望岌岌可危
zh.summary: 苏格兰在C组对巴西的0-3失利后，世界杯淘汰赛的雄心受到严重威胁，防线漏洞导致失利代价高昂。这场失利使苏格兰前往32强的道路在进入小组赛最后阶段时变得不确定。巴西以小组第一的身份结束C组比赛。

title: Morocco progress after victory over Haiti
summary: Morocco advanced in the World Cup by defeating Haiti with late goals from Soufiane Rahimi and Gessime Yassine. The victory denied Haiti a historic first World Cup point and keeps Morocco's tournament hopes alive.
content: Soufiane Rahimi and Gessime Yassine score late goals for Morocco to deny Haiti their first-ever World Cup point in Atlanta.

zh.title: 摩洛哥击败海地后晋级
zh.summary: 摩洛哥通过击败海地而在世界杯中晋级，苏菲亚内·拉希米和格西梅·亚辛在比赛后期进球。这场胜利阻止了海地创造历史性的首个世界杯积分，并保持了摩洛哥的锦标赛希望。

title: Who was the pick of Scotland's players again?
summary: This article invites readers to rate players from the Scotland-Brazil World Cup match on a scale of 10, with final ratings to be revealed 30 minutes after the match concludes. The interactive feature allows fans to assess individual player performances from the contest.
content: Rate the Scotland and Brazil players out of 10 below and come back 30 minutes after full-time to see the final ratings.

zh.title: 苏格兰队员中的精选是谁？
zh.summary: 这篇文章邀请读者对苏格兰-巴西世界杯比赛中的球员进行1-10分的评分，最终评分将在比赛结束后30分钟公布。这个互动功能允许球迷评估比赛中各个球员的表现。
